v1_1_phase: W2.T5 AUTOMATE — 3rd AIER worker = skill QA validator. Inheritance principle: kế thừa 100% từ aier-qa-canon W2.T4 architecture (5 checks + report schema + workflow + 10 tests + caller of aier-state-update + race-safe pull-rebase). Lane_01 self-approve under AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 YES list — Python worker + JSON Schema + workflow YAML + pytest tests are tech non-canon (READS skills + capabilities + laws but does NOT edit them).
scope: Build aier-qa-skill worker — Python + GitHub Action workflow_dispatch only — validates SHARED/skills/* consistency (5 checks: metadata_completeness, skill_md_heading_order, cross_skill_dependency_graph, capability_match, example_coverage) → dispatch findings via dispatcher CLI to Lane_01 (skill owner). Completes the 3-worker QA family: aier-scan (general repo health W2.T3) + aier-qa-canon (canon drift W2.T4) + aier-qa-skill (skill consistency W2.T5).

phases.B: contracts/skill_report.schema.json (NEW JSON Schema draft-07; adapted from canon_report.schema.json) + check_contract_files.ps1 update
phases.A: scripts/workers/aier_qa_skill.py v1.0 (~600 lines) — 5 check functions; SkillReport object; skill_health_score 0-100; modes (--scan-only / --dry-run / --self-test / --check NAME)
phases.D: tests/test_aier_qa_skill.py (10 pytest tests) — 5 check fixtures + schema valid + dispatch-to-Lane_01 + no-findings-no-dispatch + self-test + audit shape
phases.C: .github/workflows/aier_qa_skill.yml workflow_dispatch only — NO cron per R-RUN-01..06; inputs check_mode + auto_dispatch + target_lane (Lane_01 default)

parallel_safety.lane_3_active: parallel canon expertise work — different folder
parallel_safety.lane_2_active: parallel W2 hygiene tasks — different folder
parallel_safety.verdict: PARALLEL SAFE — Lane_01 owns scripts/workers + contracts + .github/workflows + tests; Lane_02 + Lane_03 don't touch these. Real scan READS SHARED/skills/* + SHARED/capabilities/ which Lane_03 may concurrently modify but worker just reads + reports + doesn't edit.
parallel_safety.conflict_protocol: git pull --rebase before final commit + NOTIFICATION_LEDGER NTF id reservation +1 from latest seen
